risks.message: T026 'Optimize p95 under 700ms response-time SLO for 50,000 concurrent users' blocks 8 tasks -- critical single point of failure
risks.mitigation: Split task or add a parallel implementation path

risks.message: T030 'Enforce RTO under 30 minutes recovery objectives' blocks 8 tasks -- critical single point of failure

risks.message: Foundational NFR gates (T020, T018, T025) collectively gate 10 downstream tasks and should be front-loaded early
risks.mitigation: Schedule foundational NFR tasks as parallel early work and validate them incrementally rather than treating each as an isolated blocker

risks.message: 22 tasks can start simultaneously -- high coordination overhead in first sprint
risks.mitigation: Assign clear task owners before sprint starts

risks.message: Total effort 1070h is very high -- delivery risk
risks.mitigation: Reduce scope to MVP or extend timeline significantly

risks.message: NFR work (785h) exceeds FR work (285h) -- quality engineering dominates timeline
risks.mitigation: Consider deferring lower-priority NFR tasks to a later phase

risks.message: Dependency sequencing was inferred for some tasks -- not explicitly stated in requirements
risks.mitigation: Verify inferred dependencies with stakeholders before sprint

risks.message: Critical path spans 7 tasks -- any delay cascades to project end
risks.mitigation: Add parallel tracks or fast-track critical path tasks
